---
name: Project work item
about: Track modernization, migration, or performance engineering work
title: "[Work Item]: "
labels: ["modernization", "planning"]
assignees: ""
---

## Objective

Describe the outcome this work item should deliver.

## Scope

What is included?

## Out of Scope

What is intentionally excluded?

## Technical Approach

Summarize the proposed design, migration step, tuning change, or automation.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Outcome is measurable
- [ ] Risks are documented
- [ ] Validation approach is defined
- [ ] Rollback or fallback is documented where applicable

## Notes

Add context, dependencies, or decisions.
